creator: h@hartzer.sh
text:
I am trying the Shotcut 22.06.23 on FreeBSD 13.2 with Wayland. With Wayland it launches, but nothing happens if I try to drag a clip onto the timeline area.

If I launch it under X-org mode with `WAYLAND_DISPLAY="" shotcut`, I can drag the video and it shows up under my cursor, but dropping it into the area has no effect.

From the bug reports on Shotcut's repo, it sounds like there's known issues with Wayland that should be resolved with QT6. But I don't think they have a release cut yet with QT6, unless I'm mistaken.
